title: SMALL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT CENTER - 211info
text: CLATSOP COMMUNITY COLLEGE SMALL BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides confidential one-on-one business advising to new and existing businesses through personalized training and workshops. Assists with business and marketing plans, financial proposals, and provides market research assistance. 1651 Lexington Avenue Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Current or prospective for-profit business owners Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 338-2402 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 338-2402 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to register FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Business Development Financial Literacy Training Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - CLATSOP COMMUNITY COLLEGE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - TRIO STUDENT SUPPORT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLATSOP COMMUNITY COLLEGE
